## Validation

- [ ] `python -m skill_doctor examples/good-skills --format json`

## Checklist

- [ ] New or changed finding codes are documented.
- [ ] Scanning remains static and does not execute target skill scripts.
- [ ] User-facing messages are concise and actionable.
